revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-2-545

Alternative term: Cill

The lowest horizontal part of a frame, typically that of a frame to a door or window.


Note: The French term for a window sill is appui.

{{IALAFooter}}
